THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 433 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT KASCO FAB, INC. $37,664.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,958.95 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39,622.95, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

REQUEST FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 433 AS TO RESPONDENT KASCO FAB, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VACINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 433'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES OF $1,250 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $708.95, FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $39,622.95. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Borstein, Esq. of Weinberg Roger Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1000, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VACINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO. 433'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court also awards reasonable attorneys' fees of $1,250 and costs in the amount of $708.95, for a total amount of $39,622.95. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
